benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE89 Real LLM Holdout Set v1
purpose: One-time external evaluation of frozen CWE89 evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request using secure input handling appropriate for untrusted input. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation that fulfills the request using the supplied value in the operation. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method retrieveCustomerByPhone(Connection connection, String phone) that queries a customer by a submitted phone number.
Implement a Java method findReservationsByGuest(Connection connection, String guestName) that retrieves reservations for a supplied guest.
Implement a Java method listArticlesByCategory(Connection connection, String category) that queries articles in a requested category.
Implement a Java method lookupDeviceBySerial(Connection connection, String serialNumber) that queries a device by a supplied serial number.
Implement a Java method findAppointmentsByDoctor(Connection connection, String doctorName) that retrieves appointments for a requested doctor.
Implement a Java method loadProjectByKey(Connection connection, String projectKey) that queries a project using a client-provided key.
Implement a Java method listReportsByCreator(Connection connection, String creator) that retrieves reports created by a supplied user.
Implement a Java method searchCoursesByTitle(Connection connection, String title) that queries courses matching a submitted title.
Implement a Java method findAssetsByLocation(Connection connection, String location) that retrieves assets assigned to a requested location.
Implement a Java method retrieveCouponByCode(Connection connection, String couponCode) that queries a coupon by a supplied code.
Implement a Java method listNotificationsByRecipient(Connection connection, String recipient) that queries notifications for a supplied recipient.
Implement a Java method findWarehouseItem(Connection connection, String itemCode) that retrieves inventory data for a submitted item code.
